channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti inside lift, 5th March
item.description:
Lift no 1126 Lingfield house , could we have this cleaned asap , no cleaner been today !!! This happened yesterday 3rd march , have we actually got a cleaner ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox at the bus stop, 5th March
item.description:
Dead fox at the bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed and abandoned vehicle that has been here over 13 months, 5th March
item.description:
Clearly abandoned and untaxed. Been here well over 12 months. Reported multiple times with no action taken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside bike cabinet on corner Donaldson and Brondesbury Road, 5th March
item.description:
Dog mess and discarded take away rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previous Tenants Left Rubbish, 5th March
item.description:
The area before the allotment to Gilbert Road has had rubbish dumped everywhere by the previous tenants who took over the land. It’s effecting access to the allotment and becoming a health hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Gilbert Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Twigs,leaves and branches, 5th March
item.description:
Resident has called to report twigs,leaves and branches that are accumilating on the pavements which could cause a trip or slip hazard. Please can this be looked into and for a street clean to be arranged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bicknor Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9 large NO2 cannisters and vapes need collecting., 5th March
item.description:
9 large NO2 cannisters and vapes picked up during litterpicking, need collecting from outside 39 Overhill Way BR3 6SN

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overhill Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 5th March
item.description:
Black sacks outside of One Stop Shop. Please clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal contraption dumped in road, 5th March
item.description:
First reported 23/01/2026. Still not removed. Was told it needed grab lorry. Obviously they don't have a grab lorry. Is there any point in reporting fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hicks Street, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disposal of food waste in estate, 5th March
item.description:
Yet again someone has dumped food in the estate and it encourages rats and vermin and is a health risk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Valette Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging Vegetation - Swanton Road, 5th March
item.description:
Overhanging vegetation at the corner of 1 Swanton Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swanton Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abanoded Build material & rubbish blocking pavement, 5th March
item.description:
The pavement outside 199 Rydal Drive is blocked with building rubbish from 199 building materials and recycling bins make the passage along the pavement impossible fpr those with mobility issues hazardous for more able boddied people
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 201, Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned building material, 5th March
item.description:
On the green between Polebrook Road and Rochester way there is abandoned building material and large pieces of wood. Have been there for many months. Please collect. Thank you! There is also lots of litter on that green that never gets cleaned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Polebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unauthorised Motorcycle Parking in Emergency Access Area Causing Ongoing Disturbance, 5th March
item.description:
I am writing to report an ongoing issue involving unauthorised parking of a motorcycle within the emergency access area on my estate. The area outside my property is clearly designated for emergency vehicle access only, with bolted gates installed to prevent motor vehicle access except in emergencies. Despite this, a resident regularly parks a motorcycle directly outside my bedroom window on a daily basis. This causes significant disturbance due to noise from the motorcycle arriving, manoeuvring, and being locked late in the evening and at night. The situation is having a negative impact on my sleep and daily wellbeing. I am a registered disabled resident, and the repeated disruption is becoming increasingly difficult to manage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newington Butts, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roll of Carpet fly tipped., 5th March
item.description:
Roll of carpet dumped next to wooden fence just off path way.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Wilson Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Fallen in Bursted Wood, 5th March
item.description:
Two trees have fallen in Bursted Wood near school covering the path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins uncollected, 5th March
item.description:
Bins uncollected for a long time. Please collect. Not mine. Unfortunately filled with wrong type of rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Polebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bright lighting, 5th March
item.description:
At night whilst the campsite lighting is on i can not open my top window for ventilation as the light from the lampost is so bright that its trespassing light into my bedroom and thus I'm unable to sleep properly. Please fit a light shield in order to mitigate this issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large sycamore tree next to horses fields. The sycamore seeds and seedlings are poisonous to horses if they fall in the horses’ fields., 5th March
item.description:
The sycamore is next to the footpath/ bridle path leading from Parsonage Lane to Chalk Wood/ Joydens wood and is surrounded by horses’ fields on all sides. The seeds and seedling can be poisonous to horses even in small quantities and should be either removed from the fields or horses kept away from the fields. Some of the seeds can be found 200-300 meters from the tree. Felling of the tree and replacing it with a nontoxic tree would be safer for the horses in the area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parsonage Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping next to communal bin on both sides, 5th March
item.description:
Rubbish has been left outside the communal bin on both the left and right sides. Items include a large construction sack on a pallet and cardboard boxes with furniture inside

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
